title: Uncle's Kitchen
story_html: My uncle is a chef. He is honest and patient. Cooking is his daily routine. First, he washes the beans. Then he cooks them with rice. The dish has a nice flavor. It smells delicious! My aunt is a singer. She sings songs at his restaurant. After dinner, I do my reading. I open a book about wild animals. It has a lion. The big cat rests under a tree. The book also shows a crocodile. It swims in a river with sharp teeth. I love story time with my family.

patient.def: Able to wait calmly without getting upset.

beans.def: Small seeds that grow in pods and are cooked as food.

singer.def: A person whose job is to sing.

reading.def: Looking at words and understanding them.

chef.def: A person whose job is to cook food, often in a restaurant.

lion.def: A large wild cat known as a strong hunter.

crocodile.def: A large reptile with a long body and sharp teeth that lives in rivers.

routine.def: The usual things you do every day, in order.

questions.qtext: "He is honest and patient." What does patient mean?
questions.explain: Patient means you can wait calmly without getting upset.

questions.qtext: "The dish has a nice flavor." What does flavor mean?
questions.explain: Flavor means the taste of a food.
The story says, "My uncle is a chef."

questions.qtext: What does the uncle cook with the beans?
questions.explain: The story says he cooks the beans with rice.

questions.qtext: What animal rests under a tree in the book?
questions.explain: The story says the big cat, a lion, rests under a tree.
